title: Gibellina Heartquake VR
description: Gibellina Heartquake is a VR experience exploring the memory of Gibellina and the 1968 Belice earthquake. Blending historical reconstruction with symbolic, dreamlike environments, it places the viewer inside key moments of destruction, survival, and rebirth, while reflecting on collective memory, unfinished architecture, and the fragile identity of a city shaped by trauma and art.
